kpis.title: Requests Running
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_running_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_num_requests_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Abort Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_num_aborted_requests_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Paused Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_paused_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Retracted Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_retracted_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Prompt Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_prompt_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Generation Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_generation_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Realtime Token Rate (Prefill Compute)
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_realtime_tokens_total/prefill_compute", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Realtime Token Rate (Prefill Cache)
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_realtime_tokens_total/prefill_cache", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Realtime Token Rate (Decode)
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_realtime_tokens_total/decode", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Requests Waiting
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_queue_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Prefill Prealloc Queue Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_prefill_prealloc_queue_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Prefill Inflight Queue Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_prefill_inflight_queue_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Decode Prealloc Queue Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_decode_prealloc_queue_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Decode Transfer Queue Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_num_decode_transfer_queue_reqs" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Cache Hit Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_cache_hit_rate" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Cached Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_cached_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Evicted Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_evicted_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Speculative Accept Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_spec_accept_rate" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Speculative Accept Length
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("sglang_spec_accept_length" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Estimated FLOPS per GPU
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_estimated_flops_per_gpu_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Estimated Memory Read Bandwidth per GPU
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_estimated_read_bytes_per_gpu_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Estimated Memory Write Bandwidth per GPU
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("sglang_estimated_write_bytes_per_gpu_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t
